title: Sanji’s Childhood Wound
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Cracker, Sanji as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji’s past explains why his family name is a wound rather than a source of pride.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are we going to do about that cruise ship at the port?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They're unrelated to our mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: leave them be.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Get on that ship, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Suck it up, quit sobbing like a baby, and just do it already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: HNGG...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can never come back to us... do you hear me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...Dyeah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world is a really big place ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One day ...you're definitely gonna meet people who'll treat you the way you de- serve to be treated!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: GO! DON'T LOOK BACK... DON'T TURN BACK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Waaaaah- HHH!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Move it or lose it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: W... well, miss Reju... We should probably tend to Lord Sanji's Injuri-...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What part of move it or lose it don't you understand!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that really the face of a man about to go see his fiance?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just some restaurant owner you used to work with!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do you care so much? You must've known what would happen if you came back here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know you have very few pleasant memories about this place...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The seducing woods.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 11 hours since the beginning of the battle between lofty and cracker.

dialogue.speaker: Cracker
dialogue.text: Master cracker...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I haven't been a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Whereze: whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Guh... GH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm full, damn it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Nobody told you to start eating them!!

dialogue.speaker: Cracker
dialogue.text: I'm not passing on free biscuits Dammit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: -Whereze: @Weezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezeze:

dialogue.speaker: Cracker
dialogue.text: How dare you devour my Biscuit Soldiers?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Fight... run... eat... repeat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm getting sick and tired of this strategy of yours!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought he was exaggerating when he said he could produce an infinite amount of biscuits, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: doesn't matter... Because his stamina...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Definitely isn't in- Finite!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look who's talking?! Go on, keep on stuff- ing your face with them... I look forward to watching you explode and die!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe then your little friend will finally realize how futile all this is!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well bring it then!!! I can eat whatever you have to dish out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's gonna take a hell of a lot more than this to stop me... from seeing Sanj!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Eat 'em up!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 41 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
